All right, what is the 5-4 function assessment? All right, so you have all heard Alex talk about the 5-4 functions of the business This is essentially how he solves every problem for every person who says they don't know what to do in their business You don't know what your priorities are. You don't know where to look You don't know where to focus your attention. It's because you aren't doing this Okay, this is how our minds look at anyone's business and this is how you need to train your mind and your team to look at your business Okay, so what is this? It's an evaluation every teammate makes of the business each quarter to identify large bottlenecks leading to an agreement of business Priorities, okay, so you're showing data to people to then come to a mutual agreement So you want to provide your team with the following information and send a woofoo survey about seven days Prior to the quarterly meetings so you can gather everyone's feedback. Okay, and if you're thinking to yourself Oh my gosh, my team doesn't know what these functions are That in itself is an issue And so you want to send this out to everyone with the information? I'm providing you right so that they understand and if they respond and say I don't really know how to rate this function because I don't understand and that's a problem in itself And that's something that you need to identify as a priority of your business explaining to them what it is, right? So how do you go about doing this one? You're gonna define each function for your team Two you're gonna explain that you're gonna rate on a scale of one to five Three you're gonna ask everyone to explain the strengths and weaknesses of each function Four you're going to have everyone compare it to the quarter prior Okay, so if this is the first time doing it you obviously don't need to do that but going forward you will do so Okay Definitions these are just examples Lead generation which is the action or process of identifying and cultivating potential customers Lead nurture the process of developing relationships with buyers at every stage of the sales funnel and through every step of the buyers journey Focuses on marketing communication efforts on listening to the needs of the prospects providing the information and answers they need right communication Three sales or conversions the act of turning prospect prospective customers into paying customers, right? Four is delivery giving our customers what they've been promised Five is retention and resell retentions our ability to keep our customers Happy thus retain them and resell is your ability to upsell them So an example of how to rate the functions, okay, this would be one so you would have this on a woofoo form It would say lead generation number one. How would you rate our lead gen on scale one to five? One being terrible and non-existent Five being perfect and needing no change. Okay Follow-up questions. What are our lead generation strengths? Maybe you're really good at Getting Facebook leads to work right maybe you're really good at coming up new creative What are lead generation weaknesses? Maybe you can't figure out Instagram Maybe you can't get Instagram snap or snapchat stories to work whatever it may be right those are weaknesses And then how would you compare this to quarter three? Is it better? Is it worse? Is it the same so if you have done this before and this is your second time around Asking them. Do you think we have improved maintained or gone down, right? And to give you an idea. I have never rated anything on our business of five. In fact, I barely ever rated anything before
